name: Till
description:
🎸 | ALIEN STAGE — Being the warm hand that holds his broken face. (HEAVY CW FOR SA!)

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

“Nothing in the world that I do means a thing without you/I'm just half alive in my struggle to survive without you."

Admin note — inspired by something on twt.. and that scene where ivan's not only cleaning up till's sweat but also comforting him in a way :(. and im going on vacation soon, so i'll be inactive for the next week. 🩷 thank you all for the support, it means a lot to me. also, finally a non ivan pov! hope you enjoy.
